name: CHUNGDAHM Learning, Inc.
summary: CHUNGDAHM Learning, Inc. engages in the education business in South Korea and internationally. It provides kindergarten and adult learning content services, as well as operates learning assessment centers. The company was formerly known as CDI Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to CHUNGDAHM Learning, Inc. in 2008. CHUNGDAHM Learning, Inc. was founded in 1998 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
